ham.subject: Important: Updated Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the Company Leave Policy has been updated effective July 1, 2024. The key changes include:

- Annual Paid Leave: 20 days for all full‑time employees.
- Sick Leave: 10 days per calendar year.
- Family Care Leave: 5 days for eligible employees.
- Remote Work Leave: 15 days per year.

All employees must submit leave requests through the HR portal at <URL> by the end of this week. For any questions, contact HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Jane Doe
HR Manager

spam.subject: URGENT: Verify Your Zoom/Teams Credentials Now
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

This is Alex Johnson, IT Security Officer. We have detected irregular activity on your Zoom/Teams account. To protect your data and comply with our security policy, you must update your meeting credentials immediately.

Please click the link below to verify your identity and reset your meeting password:

<URL>

Failure to comply within 24 hours will result in temporary suspension of your Zoom/Teams access.

Thank you,
Alex Johnson
IT Security Team
